news.t: WisdomTree's India Hedged Equity Fund (INDH) Wins Best New International Equity ETF at ETF.com Awards 2025
WisdomTree Announces Launch of India Equity Hedged Fund (INDH)

holdings.infoBox: INDH is an equity ETF with a total of 79 individual holdings. The top holdings are Reliance Industries stock at 8.82%, HDFC Bank at 7.51%, ICICI Bank at 6.76%, Bharti Airtel at 4.55%, and Infosys at 4.03%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree India Hedged Equity Fund (INDH) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the WisdomTree India Hedged Equity index. The fund tracks a market-cap weighted index comprised of the 75 largest companies in India. The fund employs currency hedging strategies to protect against fluctuations between the Indian Rupee and the US Dollar INDH was launched on May 9, 2024 and is issued by WisdomTree.

data.title: WisdomTree's India Hedged Equity Fund (INDH) Wins Best New International Equity ETF at ETF.com Awards 2025
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--WisdomTree's India Hedged Equity Fund (INDH) has been named “Best New International Equity ETF” at the ETF.com Awards 2025.

data.title: WisdomTree Announces Launch of India Equity Hedged Fund (INDH)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--WisdomTree today announces the launch of the WisdomTree India Hedged Equity Fund (INDH) on the NASDAQ.
